name: obsidian-aveva-pml-ide
description: PML/PML2 coding and Drawing-to-E3D automation for AVEVA Engineering, AVEVA E3D Design, and AVEVA Unified Engineering.

in: PML2 functions, objects, forms, macros, callbacks
Drawing-to-E3D workflows from AutoCAD 2D, P&ID, PFD, line list, PDF, table, and unstructured engineering inputs
Auditable model intent extraction before PML generation
File I/O, error handling, RVM export
Optional project knowledge used to constrain generated PML/forms/DBOUTPUT/DBLISTING and document project decisions
out: Generic programming unrelated to PML or E3D model automation
Generic BI dashboards disconnected from PML, E3D, or project validation
